subparts.text: Define risk in the context of disaster. 1
What are the phases of rehabilitation and reconstruction? 1
What are the main causes of forest fires? 2
What is the impact of high-rise constructions on vulnerability? 2
What is the role of GPS in disaster response? 3
What is an early warning system? 3
What is the purpose of a CPR drill? 4 CO Mapping

questions.question_text: Reflect on how pre-disaster planning can reduce the impact of natural and man-made disasters. 1
Propose a strategy to enhance public awareness and education on basic disaster concepts. 1
Examine the effects of climate change on the pattern and severity of natural disasters. 2
How can disaster risk be minimized in infrastructure development and urban planning? 2
Propose an integrated disaster communication system for a coastal city vulnerable to cyclones. 3
Explain how Remote Sensing, GIS, and GPS can be integrated for effective disaster management. 3
Reflect on the challenges faced in implementing national disaster management policies at the grassroots level. 4
Explain how the Disaster Management Act of 2005 has transformed disaster governance in India. 4
